_comment: Committed Python expectation (generated with ~/Desktop/databench/databench/.venv). An RL sample whose OPEN dicts carry integer-valued floats: top-level signals.quality=1.0 (feeds row_digest -> dataset version) and rollout.meta.s=2.0 (feeds sample content -> id). `sampleText` is the RAW JSON body text (1.0/2.0 preserved as lexemes); it must NOT be pre-parsed, or the lexeme is lost. See fix #1.
